回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 東協市場經營管理 (ASEAN Market Management)	開課班級 : 企業管理學系碩一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 顏郁芳	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
ASEAN is the most dynamic and fastest growing region in the world but also has some of the world's most distinctive culture and business systems. It offers tremendous opportunities for investors and busiensses. The course will applly a framework to understand each country along these dimensions. This is a practical and comprehensive course to succeeding in ASEAN countries. 


2.教學綱要
The purpose of this course is for you to understand ASEAN theories and practices, so you are able to assess the bussienss evnironment. This course will also introdudce you to key concepts for managing practices such as the history of hte ASEAN market, operating environment of the ASEAN market, consumption and cultural analysis of the ASEAN market, and ASEAN business operation case analysis. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Doing business in Asean Countries (International B
usiness Collection)　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Balbir Bhasin　出版社 : 　版本 :  


4.參考書
1	書名 : Doing Business in the Asean Markets:Leadership challenges and governance solution across Asian borders.　出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : P. Verhezen, I. Williamson, & N. Soebagjo.　出版社 : 　版本 :  

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

Each student have to present the weekly topic.
